result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make sure that everyone—no matter where they’re born—has reliable access to clean water, nutritious food, basic healthcare, and a quality education. Providing those fundamentals would give every person a real chance at a healthy, dignified life and set the stage for all other forms of progress.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make sure that everyone—no matter where they’re born—has reliable access to clean water, nutritious food, basic healthcare, and a quality education. Providing those fundamentals would give every person a real chance at a healthy, dignified life and set the stage for all other forms of progress.
